scripts.build:macos: npm run buildparcel && python3 py2app_horus.py py2app
scripts.requirements:win32: npm install && virtualenv .horus && .horus/Scripts/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.requirements:macos: npm install && virtualenv .horus && source .horus/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.requirements:linux: npm install && virtualenv .horus && source .horus/local/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
